channel.title: Home on GAJAB TOOLS
channel.description: Recent content in Home on GAJAB TOOLS

item.title: What is Notix? Complete Guide, Uses & Setup (2026)
item.description:
What is Notix? Complete Guide, Uses & Setup (2026)

Notix is a powerful web push notification platform that allows website owners to send instant notifications to their users directly on their browsers or mobile devices without requiring any app installation.

What is Notix?

Notix is a marketing automation tool designed for bloggers, website owners, and businesses to increase traffic and user engagement using push notifications.

  • Works on Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and mobile browsers
  • No email or personal data required
  • Supports instant and scheduled notifications

Key Features of Notix

  • 🚀 Instant Push Notifications
  • 🔄 Auto Push via RSS Feed
  • 📅 Scheduled Notifications
  • 🎯 Audience Segmentation
  • 📊 Real-time Analytics Dashboard
  • 💡 Beginner-Friendly Interface

Why Use Notix?

Notix helps increase your website traffic by bringing users back through real-time alerts.

item.title: Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) Complete Guide – Setup, Benefits & Alternatives
item.description:
Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) – Complete Guide

What is Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM)?

Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) is a free push notification service provided by Google. It allows developers to send notifications and messages to users on Android, iOS, and Web applications.

Official Website Firebase Console Web Setup Guide FCM API Docs
  • Send real-time notifications
  • Deliver data messages silently
  • Target specific users or groups
  • Works even when app is in background

How FCM Works

  1. User installs app or opens website
  2. Device generates a unique token
  3. Token is saved on your server
  4. You send message using Firebase
  5. FCM delivers message to user device

FCM Setup Guide (Step-by-Step)

Step 1: Create Firebase Project

  • Go to Firebase Console
  • Click on "Add Project"
  • Enter project name and create

Step 2: Add Your App

  • Android: Add package name
  • Web: Register web app
  • iOS: Add bundle ID

Step 3: Enable Cloud Messaging

  • Go to Project Settings
  • Open Cloud Messaging tab
  • Generate Server Key / VAPID Key

Step 4: Add Firebase SDK (Web)

<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.0.0/firebase-app.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.0.0/firebase-messaging.js"></script>

Step 5: Initialize Firebase

const firebaseConfig = {
  apiKey: "YOUR_API_KEY",
  authDomain: "PROJECT_ID.firebaseapp.com",
  projectId: "PROJECT_ID",
  messagingSenderId: "SENDER_ID",
  appId: "APP_ID"
};

firebase.initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
const messaging = firebase.messaging();

Step 6: Request Permission

Notification.requestPermission().then((permission) => {
  if (permission === "granted") {
    messaging.getToken().then((token) => {
      console.log("Token:", token);
    });
  }
});

Step 7: Send Notification

  • Use Firebase Console
  • Or send via server API

Key Features of FCM

  • Free unlimited push notifications
  • Topic-based messaging
  • Device targeting
  • Scheduled notifications
  • Analytics support
  • Background message delivery

Benefits of FCM

  • 100% Free to use
  • Easy integration
  • Highly reliable (Google servers)
  • Scalable for millions of users
  • Real-time communication

FCM vs Other Alternatives

Feature FCM OneSignal Web Push (Self Hosted) AWS SNS
Cost Free Freemium Free (Server Cost) Paid
Setup Easy Very Easy Complex Medium
Analytics Basic Advanced Limited Limited
Scalability High High Depends Very High

Best Alternatives

  • OneSignal: Easy setup, marketing automation
  • Amazon SNS: Enterprise-level messaging
  • Pusher: Real-time messaging
  • Pushwoosh: Multi-channel marketing
  • Web Push Protocol: Full control without third-party

When Should You Use FCM?

  • If you need a free solution
  • If you are building apps or websites
  • If you want simple push notifications
  • If you don’t need advanced marketing tools

Limitations of FCM

  • No built-in marketing automation
  • Limited analytics
  • Requires coding knowledge
  • Token management complexity

Conclusion

Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) is one of the best free push notification services available. It is powerful, scalable, and ideal for developers who want full control over notifications.

item.title: OneSignal: Complete Guide with Features and Alternatives
item.description:
What is OneSignal? Complete Guide with Best Alternatives

OneSignal is a powerful push notification service that helps website owners, app developers, and businesses send real-time messages to users across web browsers, mobile apps, email, and SMS.

It is widely used to increase user engagement, bring visitors back to websites, and deliver important updates instantly.

Visit OneSignal

Key Features of OneSignal

  • Web Push Notifications: Send notifications directly to users’ browsers.
  • Mobile Push Support: Works with Android and iOS apps.
  • Email & SMS Integration: Multi-channel communication support.
  • Automation: Send automatic messages like welcome notifications.
  • User Segmentation: Target specific audiences based on behavior.
  • Analytics: Track delivery, open rate, and performance.

How OneSignal Works

  1. User visits your website and subscribes to notifications.
  2. OneSignal stores the subscriber data securely.
  3. You send notifications from the dashboard or automatically.
  4. Users receive messages in real-time on their device.

Advantages of OneSignal

  • Free plan available with powerful features
  • Easy integration with websites (including Hugo, WordPress, HTML)
  • Supports multiple platforms
  • Real-time user engagement
  • Automation saves time

Disadvantages of OneSignal

  • Advanced features require a paid plan
  • Limited customization in free version
  • Delivery delays may occur in some cases

Best Alternatives to OneSignal

1. Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM)

A free push notification service by Google, ideal for developers and Android apps.

item.title: Follow.it – Email Subscription Tool (Complete Guide, Features & Alternatives)
item.description:
What is Follow.it?

Follow.it is an online content subscription platform that allows website owners and bloggers to automatically send their latest posts to subscribers via email notifications. It works using RSS feeds and helps increase traffic by bringing users back whenever new content is published.

Visit Follow.it Create Free Account Login Dashboard Mailchimp Official ConvertKit Official MailerLite Official Substack Official

How Follow.it Works

  • Connect your website RSS feed (example: /index.xml)
  • Users subscribe using email or follow button
  • New posts are automatically detected
  • Subscribers receive email notifications instantly

Key Features

  • Automatic email notifications
  • RSS feed integration
  • Simple setup (no coding required)
  • Subscriber management system
  • Analytics and tracking

Advantages

  • Beginner-friendly setup
  • Free plan available
  • Fully automated system
  • Increases returning visitors
  • No manual email sending required

Disadvantages

  • Free plan includes branding
  • Limited email design customization
  • Advanced features are paid

How to Use Follow.it

  1. Create an account on Follow.it
  2. Add your website RSS feed
  3. Customize subscription form
  4. Embed the form on your website
  5. Start collecting subscribers

Who Should Use Follow.it?

  • Bloggers and website owners
  • News and update websites
  • Content creators
  • Anyone who wants automated email updates

Best Alternatives to Follow.it

1. Mailchimp

Mailchimp is a professional email marketing platform that provides advanced automation, email templates, and full branding control.

item.title: What is GajabTools.com - Complete Detail - Gajab Tools
item.description:
What is GajabTools.com?

GajabTools.com is an online platform that provides a collection of useful digital tools along with detailed guides and tutorials. It is designed to help users perform everyday tasks such as editing images, managing PDFs, formatting text, and understanding various online tools without installing any software.

Main Features of GajabTools

  • Free access to multiple online tools
  • No installation required (browser-based usage)
  • Simple and user-friendly interface
  • Mobile responsive design
  • Fast processing and easy navigation

Categories of Tools Available

1. Image Tools

  • Resize images
  • Compress images
  • Convert image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP)
  • Basic photo editing

2. PDF Tools

  • Merge multiple PDFs
  • Split PDF files
  • Compress PDF size
  • Convert PDF to image and vice versa

3. Text Tools

  • Word and character counter
  • Case converter (uppercase, lowercase)
  • Text formatting tools

4. Video Tools

  • Video compression
  • Format conversion

Blog and Guide Section

Apart from tools, GajabTools also provides detailed blog posts and guides. These articles explain how to use different tools and platforms such as Google Forms, Microsoft Forms, Hugo, WordPress, and more.

item.title: What is Producer.ai? Complete Detail- Gajab Tools
item.description:
What is Suno AI?

Suno AI is an advanced AI-powered music generation platform that can create complete songs from simple text prompts. It uses artificial intelligence to generate lyrics, vocals, and background music automatically.

Users just need to enter a prompt like “romantic Hindi song” or “rap song about success,” and Suno AI produces a full track within seconds.

Official Website AI Music Generator AI Video Creator Turntable Feature Pricing Plans

How Producer.ai Works

  • Step 1: Enter topic, keywords, or idea
  • Step 2: AI generates a script automatically
  • Step 3: AI selects images, clips, or visuals
  • Step 4: Voiceover is generated using text-to-speech
  • Step 5: Final video is edited and ready to download

Key Features of Producer.ai

  • AI Script Writing: Automatically generates content scripts
  • Video Generation: Creates videos using AI visuals
  • Text-to-Speech: Converts text into natural voiceovers
  • Auto Editing: Adds transitions, cuts, and subtitles
  • Multi-format Content: Supports YouTube, Shorts, Reels
  • Time-saving Automation: Reduces manual work

Uses of Producer.ai

  • YouTube video creation
  • Social media content (Reels, Shorts)
  • Marketing and advertising videos
  • Educational and informational content
  • Business presentations

Advantages

  • Fast content creation process
  • No professional editing skills required
  • Beginner-friendly interface
  • Cost-effective compared to manual production

Limitations

  • Limited creative control compared to manual editing
  • Output quality depends on input prompt
  • Premium features may require payment
  • May lack human creativity and emotional touch

Producer.ai Alternatives

  • Canva – Design and basic video editing
  • InVideo – AI video creation and editing
  • Pictory – AI video from text
  • Lumen5 – Social media video generator
  • Synthesia – AI avatar video creation

Conclusion

Producer.ai is a powerful solution for modern content creators who want to automate video and media production. It simplifies the workflow and allows users to create professional content quickly without advanced skills.

item.title: Clideo Video Editor Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Clideo Video Editor – Complete Guide

Clideo is an online video editing platform that allows users to edit videos directly in their web browser without installing any software. It is designed for beginners and professionals who want quick, simple, and efficient video editing.

Visit Clideo Official Website All Video Tools Start Editing Video Online Merge Videos Tool Cut Video Tool Add Subtitles Tool Text To Speech Video Translator Add Subtitle Video Converter

What is Clideo?

Clideo is a cloud-based video editing tool that offers multiple utilities such as cutting, merging, compressing, resizing, and adding subtitles to videos. Since it works online, it can be used on any device including desktops, tablets, and smartphones.

item.title: Google Sheets Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Google Sheets – Complete Guide

Learn what Google Sheets is, its features, uses, and how to get started.

Open Google Sheets Google Drive Google Sheets Templates Learn Google Sheets Help Explore Functions List

📊 What is Google Sheets?

Google Sheets is an online spreadsheet software developed by Google. It allows users to create, edit, and manage data in rows and columns, similar to Microsoft Excel, but completely online (cloud-based).

item.title: Microsoft Forms - Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Microsoft Forms - Complete Guide

📊 What is Microsoft Forms?

Microsoft Forms is an online tool developed by Microsoft that allows users to create forms, quizzes, surveys, and collect responses easily. It is part of Microsoft 365.

Open Microsoft Forms Microsoft Official Website Create New Form
It is widely used in schools, offices, and businesses for data collection and feedback.

🎯 Uses of Microsoft Forms

  • Create online registration forms
  • Conduct quizzes and exams
  • Collect customer feedback
  • Employee surveys
  • Event registrations

⚙️ Key Features

  • Easy-to-use interface
  • Mobile-friendly design
  • Real-time response tracking
  • Automatic charts and graphs
  • Export data to Excel
  • Share via link or QR code

📝 How to Create a Form

  1. Go to Microsoft Forms website
  2. Click on "New Form"
  3. Add title and description
  4. Insert questions (Text, MCQ, Rating, etc.)
  5. Customize settings
  6. Click "Share" and copy the link

📊 Comparison with Other Tools

Tool Best For Free Plan Design Special Feature
Microsoft Forms Office Users Yes Clean Excel Integration
Google Forms Beginners Yes Simple Easy Sharing
Typeform Premium UX Limited ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Interactive Design
Jotform Business Yes Advanced Templates
Zoho Forms CRM Users Yes Professional Automation

🔍 Detailed Differences

Microsoft Forms vs Google Forms

  • Microsoft Forms works best with Office tools
  • Google Forms is more popular and beginner-friendly

Microsoft Forms vs Typeform

  • Microsoft Forms is simple and free
  • Typeform offers better design and interaction

Microsoft Forms vs Jotform

  • Microsoft Forms is basic
  • Jotform offers advanced customization

Microsoft Forms vs Zoho Forms

  • Microsoft Forms is simple
  • Zoho Forms offers automation and CRM integration

✅ Advantages

  • Free and easy to use
  • Works well with Microsoft Office
  • Quick form creation
  • Automatic data analysis

❌ Disadvantages

  • Limited design customization
  • Less advanced than competitors
  • Basic features only

🧠 Conclusion

Microsoft Forms is a simple, fast, and efficient tool for creating forms and quizzes. It is best for beginners, students, and office users who want quick data collection without complex setup.

item.title: Zoho Forms Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Zoho Forms - Complete Guide

📌 What is Zoho Forms?

Zoho Forms is an online form builder tool that allows users to create forms without coding. You can create registration forms, surveys, contact forms, and collect data easily.

✔ No coding required
✔ Easy drag-and-drop builder
✔ Works on mobile and desktop

🔧 Uses of Zoho Forms

1. Registration & Application

  • School/College admission forms
  • Event registration
  • Job application forms

2. Feedback & Survey

  • Customer feedback
  • Website survey
  • Service reviews

3. Business Use

  • Lead generation
  • Client inquiry forms
  • Order & payment collection

4. Data Collection

  • Export to Excel or Google Sheets
  • Email notifications
  • Workflow automation

👨‍💻 Who Can Use Zoho Forms?

  • Students: Projects, surveys, quizzes
  • Website Owners: Contact & lead forms
  • Business Owners: Customer data & orders
  • Freelancers: Client forms & bookings
  • Government / Schemes: Application forms
👉 Zoho Forms is NOT only for office work. It is useful for everyone.

📊 Free vs Paid Plan

Feature Free Plan Paid Plan
Form Creation Limited Unlimited
Entries Limited High Limit
Payment Option No Yes
Automation Basic Advanced
Branding Removal No Yes

⭐ Advantages of Zoho Forms

  • Easy drag-and-drop builder
  • Mobile-friendly forms
  • Email & SMS alerts
  • Integration with other tools
  • Secure data storage

⚠️ Limitations

  • Free plan has limitations
  • Advanced features require payment
  • Learning curve for beginners
Zoho Forms Official Website Zoho Forms Sign Up Zoho Forms Login Zoho Forms Features Zoho Forms Pricing Zoho Forms Help Center

🚀 Conclusion

Zoho Forms is a powerful and easy tool for creating online forms. It is useful for students, bloggers, business owners, and organizations.

item.title: Google Forms Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Google Forms - Complete Detailed Guide

Create Surveys, Quizzes, and Online Forms Easily

What is Google Forms?

Google Forms is a free online tool developed by Google that allows users to create forms, surveys, quizzes, and collect data easily. It is widely used for education, business, and personal purposes without any coding knowledge.

item.title: What is Hugo? Complete Guide with Comparison - Gajab Tools
item.description:
What is Hugo? Complete Guide with Comparison

Hugo is one of the fastest static website generators. It helps you build modern websites without using a database. Hugo converts your content into static HTML files, making your website extremely fast, secure, and easy to host.

Simple Definition: Hugo is a static site generator that creates websites using Markdown and templates without requiring a database.

How Hugo Works

  • You write content in Markdown (.md)
  • Apply a theme or template
  • Hugo generates static HTML files
  • Upload your site to hosting platforms like GitHub Pages, Netlify, or Cloudflare Pages

Key Features of Hugo

1. Super Fast Performance

Hugo is known for its blazing fast speed. It can build thousands of pages in seconds.

item.title: Wordpress Complete Career Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
WordPress Complete Career Guide

Learn What WordPress Is, How to Build a Career, Earn Money & Secure Your Future


What is WordPress?

WordPress is a powerful Content Management System (CMS) that allows you to create websites without advanced coding knowledge. It is used for blogs, business websites, eCommerce stores, portfolios, and more.

item.title: Yarrlist.net – Complete Guide, Benefits, Risks & Safe Alternatives - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Yarrlist.net – Complete Guide

What is Yarrlist.net?

Yarrlist.net is an online directory platform that provides categorized links to various entertainment content such as movies, TV shows, anime, live TV, sports, games, and more. Instead of hosting content itself, it redirects users to third-party websites where the actual content is available.

item.title: Blogger Guide: What to Write & How to Improve - Gajab Tools
item.description:
What to Write on Blogger & How to Improve Your Blog

1. What Can You Write on Blogger?

Blogger is a free platform by Google that allows you to create and publish content easily. You can write about various topics, but choosing the right niche is important for success.

item.title: Google AdSense – Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Google AdSense – Complete Guide (2026)

What is Google AdSense?

Google AdSense is an advertising program by Google that allows website owners, bloggers, and YouTubers to earn money by displaying ads.

When visitors view or click on ads, you earn revenue. It is one of the most popular ways to generate passive income online.

item.title: Bridgefy - Offline Messaging App Complete Guide- Gajab Tools
item.description:
Bridgefy - Offline Messaging App

What is Bridgefy?

Bridgefy is an offline messaging application that allows users to send and receive messages without using the internet. It works using Bluetooth technology, making it extremely useful in areas where there is no mobile network or WiFi.

item.title: Freelancing Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Freelancing Complete Guide: What It Is, How to Earn, and Comparison with YouTube & Website

Freelancing is one of the most powerful ways to earn money online in today’s digital world. It allows individuals to work independently, use their skills, and earn income without being tied to a fixed job.

item.title: QuickRef.me - Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
QuickRef.me - Complete Guide (What, Features, Uses & Benefits)

QuickRef.me is a free online platform that provides quick reference guides (cheat sheets) for various programming languages, tools, and technologies. It is designed to help developers, students, and learners quickly find important syntax and commands in one place.

item.title: Equal AI – AI Call Assistant - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Equal AI – AI Call Assistant

Equal AI Call Assistant is a smart artificial intelligence-powered tool that can automatically handle phone calls. It works like a virtual receptionist that answers calls, talks to people, records information, and helps manage communication efficiently.

item.title: Msty AI - Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Msty AI Complete Guide

What is Msty AI, Uses, Safety & Offline Working

item.title: NeamX AI Thumbnail Generator - Create Viral Thumbnails in Seconds - Gajab Tools
item.description:
NeamX AI Thumbnail Generator

Create Viral YouTube Thumbnails in Seconds 🚀

Visit Tools Try Now

What is NeamX?

NeamX is an AI-powered thumbnail generator that helps creators design high-click (CTR) thumbnails instantly. It uses artificial intelligence to create eye-catching designs, bold text, and engaging visuals without requiring design skills.

item.title: Pixabay - Free Stock Images, Videos & Music - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Pixabay

Free Stock Images, Videos & Music Platform

What is Pixabay?

Pixabay is a free stock media platform that provides high-quality images, videos, illustrations, vectors, and music. All content is free to download and can be used for both personal and commercial purposes.

Sound Effects Musics Illustrations 3d Models Videos Vectors Gifs Images Visit Pixabay

Key Features of Pixabay

  • Completely free to use
  • No attribution required
  • High-quality HD and 4K media
  • Large collection of photos, videos, and music
  • Easy search and filtering options

Types of Content Available

  • Photos
  • Videos
  • Illustrations
  • Vectors
  • Music & Sound Effects

Pixabay License

Most content on Pixabay is released under the Pixabay License, which allows you to:

item.title: Suno AI - Create Songs with Artificial Intelligence - Gajab Tools
item.description:
🎵 Suno AI – Create Songs with Artificial Intelligence

Suno AI is a powerful AI music generator that allows users to create complete songs just by typing a simple text prompt.

👉 You write a sentence, and AI creates lyrics, music, and vocals automatically.

🚀 How Suno AI Works

Suno AI uses advanced artificial intelligence models trained on music data to generate songs based on your input.

item.title: Freepik - Graphic Resource Platform - Gajab Tools
item.description:
What is Freepik?

Freepik is a popular online graphic resource platform that provides high-quality design assets such as vectors, stock images, PSD templates, icons, and illustrations. It is widely used by graphic designers, web developers, bloggers, and digital marketers.

item.title: What is VS Code - Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Visual Studio Code (VS Code)

Complete Beginner to Advanced Guide

Download VS Code

💻 What is VS Code?

Visual Studio Code (VS Code) is a free and lightweight code editor developed by Microsoft. It is used for writing, editing, and managing code for websites, apps, and software.

item.title: How to Build an App Using Tile.dev (Step-by-Step Guide) - Gajab Tools
item.description:
🚀 Build an App Using Tile.dev

Step-by-Step Guide to Create Mobile Apps Faster with AI

Build App Now

📌 What is Tile.dev?

Tile.dev is an AI-powered app development platform that helps developers build mobile apps faster using automation, APIs, and intelligent agents.

item.title: What is Cloudflare? - Complete Guide
item.description:
CLOUDFLARE

Speed • Security • Performance

Go To Cloudflare Dashboard

🌐 What is Cloudflare? (Complete Guide)

Cloudflare is a web performance and security service that helps make your website faster, more secure, and highly reliable. It acts as a protective layer between your website and visitors.

🚀 How Cloudflare Works?

  1. User sends a request to open your website
  2. The request first goes to Cloudflare servers
  3. Cloudflare checks if the request is safe or malicious
  4. Safe traffic is forwarded to your origin server
  5. Cached data is served for faster response

🔥 Key Features

⚡ CDN (Content Delivery Network)

Global servers deliver your content from the nearest location for faster loading.

item.title: GitLab – Complete DevOps Platform - Gajab Tools
item.description:
GitLab – Complete DevOps Platform

All-in-One Solution for Developers

Visit Tools

📌 What is GitLab?

GitLab is a complete DevOps platform that allows developers to manage code, automate testing, and deploy applications — all in one place.

🚀 Core Features

📂 Source Code Management

  • Git repositories
  • Branching & merging
  • Version history

⚙️ CI/CD Pipelines

  • Built-in automation
  • Auto testing & deployment
  • .gitlab-ci.yml support

👥 Collaboration

  • Merge Requests
  • Code review
  • Team discussion

🔐 Security

  • Vulnerability scanning
  • Dependency scanning

🔄 DevOps Lifecycle

  • Plan → Create → Test → Deploy → Monitor

🔥 Advantages

  • All-in-one platform
  • Free plan available
  • Self-hosted + Cloud

⚔️ GitLab vs GitHub

Feature GitLab GitHub
CI/CD Built-in External
Hosting Self + Cloud Cloud
DevOps All-in-one Separate tools

⚙️ How It Works

  1. Create repository
  2. Push code
  3. Setup CI/CD
  4. Deploy project

📝 Conclusion

GitLab is a powerful DevOps tool for developers and teams who want automation, security, and collaboration in one place.

item.title: What is GitHub - Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
What is GitHub?

GitHub is an online platform used to store, manage, and share code. It is built on Git, a version control system that helps developers track changes in their projects.

item.title: Edits: Video Editor - Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Edits: Video Editor

Complete Guide for Beginners & Creators

Play Store Apple IOS Store

📱 What is Edits: Video Editor?

Edits: Video Editor is a powerful video editing application developed by Instagram (Meta). It is designed for content creators who want to create professional-quality videos for Reels, Shorts, and social media.

item.title: YouTube Create App – Free Video Editing Tool for Creators
item.description:
YouTube Create App

Play Store Apple Store

What is YouTube Create? (Complete Guide)

YouTube Create is a free mobile video editing app developed by YouTube. It allows creators to edit videos easily and upload them directly to YouTube.

item.title: Uiverse.io - Complete Guide
item.description:
Uiverse.io Complete Guide

Free UI Components for Developers & Designers

Try ViVerse Challenge Spotlight

What is Uiverse.io?

Uiverse.io is a modern platform where developers and designers share ready-made UI components like buttons, cards, loaders, forms, and animations. These components are built using HTML and CSS and can be easily copied and used in any web project.

item.title: Advanced SEO Guide 2026 - Rank #1 on Google (Full Strategy)
item.description:
This advanced SEO guide will help you rank your website using long-tail keywords, content optimization, schema markup and internal linking strategies.

Blogger Website Search Console Rich Results Page Speed Test Google Adsense Google Analytics

1. Long-Tail + Semantic Keywords Strategy

Main Keyword: pm internship yojana 2026 apply online

Semantic Keywords:

  • eligibility
  • documents
  • benefits
  • last date

👉 Always use 1 main keyword + 4–5 related keywords.

item.title: SEO Complete Guide 2026 -Beginner to Advanced (Title, URL, Keywords, Banner, Meta)
item.description:
This complete SEO guide will help you understand how to rank your website using title, URL, long-tail keywords, content keywords, banner placement and meta tags.

Blogger Website Search Console Rich Results Page Speed Test Google Adsense Google Analytics

What are Long-Tail Keywords?

Long-tail keywords are longer and more specific search phrases. They have low competition and higher chances to rank.

item.title: Google Vids - Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Google Vids

AI-Powered Video Creation Tool by Google

Try Now - Google Vids Videos

What is Google Vids?

Google Vids is a modern, AI-powered video creation tool developed by Google. It allows users to create professional videos easily using a scene-based editor, similar to slides in PowerPoint, but with advanced animation and AI features.

item.title: W3Schools - Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
W3Schools - Complete Detailed Guide

Learn Web Development Easily Online

Try W3Schools HTML CSS Javascript How To

What is W3Schools?

W3Schools is one of the most popular online learning platforms for web development and programming. It provides tutorials, references, and examples for beginners as well as experienced developers. The platform is widely used because of its simple explanations and hands-on practice environment.

item.title: What is CodePen? Features and it Uses
item.description:
What is CodePen?

An Online Front-End Development Playground

Try Now Codepen

Introduction

CodePen is an online code editor and social development platform where users can write HTML, CSS, and JavaScript directly in the browser and see the results instantly. It is widely used by developers and designers for learning, testing, and sharing front-end code snippets.

item.title: archive.org Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Archive.org (Internet Archive)

Free Digital Library + Wayback Machine + File Upload Platform

Upload - archive.org Visit Website- archive.org

What is Archive.org?

Archive.org is a free digital library managed by the Internet Archive organization. It provides access to millions of books, videos, audio files, websites, and software. The main goal is to preserve internet content and make it freely available to everyone.

item.title: Photext.shop - AI Image Text Editor Tool - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Photext.shop

AI-Based Image Text Editing Tool

What is Photext.shop?

Photext.shop is an advanced online AI tool that allows users to edit text directly inside images. Unlike traditional image editors, this tool uses AI (OCR + smart overlay technology) to detect text and make it editable with just one click.

item.title: What is SuperLogout.com - Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
SuperLogout.com

Logout from Multiple Websites in One Click

item.title: TV Garden- Watch Free all TV Channel - Gajab Tools
item.description:
🌍 What is TV Garden?

Watch Live TV Channels from Around the World

TV Garden is an online platform that allows users to watch live TV channels from different countries across the world. It usually provides an interactive world map where you can explore and stream television channels based on location.

item.title: Picsart - Complete Details, Uses & Features - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Picsart - Photo & Video Editing Tool

What is Picsart?

Picsart is a powerful photo and video editing platform that allows users to edit images, create designs, and enhance creativity easily. It is available as a mobile app (Android & iOS) and also as a web tool.

item.title: Remove.bg – Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Remove.bg

Complete Guide – Features, API, Uses & Earning Methods

Remove Background Now

What is Remove.bg?

Remove.bg is an AI-powered tool that automatically removes image backgrounds within seconds. It detects the subject (person, object, product) and removes the background without manual editing.

item.title: NotebookLM by Google – Features, Uses & Earning Guide
item.description:
NotebookLM by Google – Complete Guide

NotebookLM is an advanced AI-powered note-taking and research tool developed by Google. It helps users understand documents, summarize content, and generate insights from uploaded materials like PDFs, Google Docs, and text files.

item.title: Terms & Conditions - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Terms & Conditions

Effective Date: 19 February 2026

Website: https://gajabtools.com

Welcome to GajabTools.com. By accessing and using this website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms and Conditions.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By using this website, you confirm that you accept these Terms & Conditions and agree to follow them. If you do not agree, please do not use the website.

2. Use of Website

GajabTools.com provides browser-based online tools including but not limited to image tools, resume generators, calculators, converters, and utilities.

item.title: Privacy Policy - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Privacy Policy

Effective Date: 19 February 2026

Website: https://gajabtools.com

Welcome to GajabTools.com. Your privacy is extremely important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information when you use our website.

1. Information We Collect

a) Personal Information

We do not collect personal information unless you voluntarily provide it (for example, through a contact form).

  • Name
  • Email address
  • Message details

b) Non-Personal Information

We may automatically collect certain non-personal information such as:

item.title: DMCA Policy - Gajab Tools
item.description:
DMCA Policy

Effective Date: 19 February 2026

Website: https://gajabtools.com

GajabTools.com respects the intellectual property rights of others and expects users of our website to do the same.

If you believe that any content available on our website infringes your copyright, you may submit a DMCA takedown request.

1. Copyright Infringement Notification

If you are a copyright owner (or authorized to act on behalf of one) and believe that your copyrighted material has been used on our website without permission, please provide the following information:

item.title: Disclaimer - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Disclaimer

Effective Date: 19 February 2026

Website: https://gajabtools.com

The information and tools provided on GajabTools.com are for general informational and utility purposes only.

1. General Information Disclaimer

All content and tools on this website are provided in good faith. However, we make no representation or warranty of any kind regarding the accuracy, adequacy, validity, reliability, or completeness of any information.

Your use of the website and its tools is solely at your own risk.

item.title: Cookie Policy - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Cookie Policy

Effective Date: 19 February 2026

Website: https://gajabtools.com

This Cookie Policy explains how GajabTools.com uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website.

GajabTools.com is a privacy-focused, browser-based tools platform. We do not store user data on our servers.

1. What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help improve user experience and website functionality.

2. How We Use Cookies

We may use cookies for the following purposes:

item.title: Contact Us- Gajab Tools
item.description:
Contact Us

If you have any questions, suggestions, feedback, or business inquiries, feel free to reach out to us.

Email: yojnaportalhelp@gmail.com
Instagram: Gajab Jobs Instagram
Website: gajabtools.com

Send Us a Message

We respect your privacy. We do not store your contact form data on our servers.

item.title: About Us - Gajab Tools
item.description:
About Us

Welcome to GajabTools.com — a modern, privacy-focused online tools platform designed to make your digital tasks faster, easier, and more secure.

Our mission is simple: Provide powerful browser-based tools that work instantly without uploading your data to any server.

Who We Are

GajabTools.com is an independent online tools website created to help users access useful utilities without complicated software installations.

We focus on:

  • Fast and lightweight tools
  • 100% browser-based processing
  • User privacy and security
  • Simple and clean interface

What We Offer

Our website provides various tools including but not limited to:

item.title: Legal Pages - Gajab Tools
item.description:
📜 Legal Pages

Welcome to GajabTools.com. This page outlines all legal policies including Privacy Policy, Disclaimer, Terms & Conditions, and more.

🔒 Privacy Policy

We value your privacy. We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, and browsing behavior.

Google AdSense

We use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google may use cookies (DART cookies) to serve ads based on user visits.

item.title: AutoAE.online - Complete Details
item.description:
AutoAE.online - Complete Guide

What is AutoAE.online?

AutoAE.online is an AI-powered video editing platform that allows users to create professional animations and videos using ready-made templates. It works similarly to Adobe After Effects, but without requiring any advanced editing skills.

item.title: Napkin.ai – What Is It, Features, Uses & How to Earn Money
item.description:
Napkin.ai

Turn Your Ideas into Visual Diagrams with AI

Visit AI Tools

What is Napkin.ai?

Napkin.ai is an advanced AI-powered tool that converts your written text into visual diagrams such as flowcharts, mind maps, and process charts. It helps users quickly visualize ideas without requiring any design skills.

How Napkin.ai Works

Napkin.ai follows a simple process:

  • Enter your idea or text
  • The AI analyzes your content
  • It automatically generates a visual diagram
Example: "Login → Select Product → Payment → Order Confirmation" will be converted into a flowchart.

Key Features

  • Text to Diagram Conversion
  • Supports Flowcharts, Mind Maps, and Workflows
  • Fast and automatic generation
  • Clean and user-friendly interface
  • Export as PNG or PDF

Uses of Napkin.ai

  • Business planning and strategy visualization
  • Student notes and mind mapping
  • Software and workflow design
  • Project management
  • Content planning

How to Earn Money Using Napkin.ai

  • Sell diagram design services on Fiverr and Upwork
  • Create visual content for blogs and YouTube
  • Sell notes and mind maps to students
  • Provide workflow solutions for businesses

Advantages

  • Saves time and effort
  • No design skills required
  • Easy to use for beginners
  • Professional output

Disadvantages

  • Limited features in free version
  • Requires internet connection
  • Complex diagrams may need manual editing

Conclusion

Napkin.ai is a powerful AI tool that simplifies the process of turning ideas into visual diagrams. Whether you are a student, developer, or business owner, it can help you present your thoughts clearly and efficiently.

item.title: Higgsfield.ai – Complete Guide, Uses & How to Earn Money
item.description:
Higgsfield.ai – Complete Guide, Uses & How to Earn Money

Higgsfield.ai is an advanced AI-powered platform that helps users create content, automate tasks, and improve digital marketing strategies. It uses artificial intelligence to generate text, videos, and business content quickly and efficiently.

item.title: PixVerse AI – Create AI Videos from Text & Images (Full Guide)
item.description:
PixVerse AI

Create Stunning AI Videos from Text & Images in Seconds

item.title: ImageEditor.Online – Free Online Photo Editing Tool
item.description:
ImageEditor.Online

What is ImageEditor.Online?

ImageEditor.Online is a free browser-based photo editing tool that allows users to edit images quickly without installing any software. It is designed for beginners and professionals who need fast and simple image editing solutions.

item.title: ElevenLabs AI - Full Details, Features & Usage
item.description:
🎙️ ElevenLabs AI

Realistic Voice Generation & AI Voice Cloning Tool

item.title: Eye2.ai – What Is It? Complete Guide, Features, Benefits & Is It Safe?
item.description:
Eye2.ai – Complete Guide (Features, Benefits, Use Cases & Safety)

Eye2.ai is a modern AI-powered platform that allows users to access multiple artificial intelligence tools in one place. Instead of using different AI websites separately, Eye2.ai combines them and shows responses side-by-side for easy comparison.

item.title: Bing AI (Microsoft Copilot) – Complete Guide
item.description:
Bing AI (Microsoft Copilot) – Smart AI Assistant

Bing AI (Microsoft Copilot) – Complete Information

Bing AI, now officially known as Microsoft Copilot, is an advanced AI-powered chatbot developed by Microsoft. It combines artificial intelligence with real-time internet search to provide accurate, fast, and intelligent responses.

item.title: Bandy.ai – AI Video Generator Tool (Full Guide)
item.description:
Bandy.ai

Turn Your Text into Professional AI Videos

item.title: ModelsLab.com – What Is It? Full Guide, Features, Uses & Safety
item.description:
ModelsLab.com – What Is It? Complete Guide

ModelsLab.com is an AI-powered platform that provides various Artificial Intelligence tools through APIs. It helps developers, creators, and businesses integrate AI features into their websites, apps, and projects easily.

item.title: Manus.im AI – Full Details, Features, Uses & Safety
item.description:
Manus.im AI – Complete Guide

Manus.im AI is an advanced AI-powered autonomous agent designed to perform tasks automatically with minimal human input. Unlike traditional AI chat tools, it can understand, plan, and execute complex tasks step by step.

item.title: OXAAM.com – Is It Safe or Fake? Full Details
item.description:
OXAAM.com

Free Pro Accounts or Risky Platform?

What is OXAAM.com?

OXAAM.com is an online website that claims to provide free access to premium or pro accounts by sharing email IDs and passwords. These accounts are usually for paid services, tools, or software.

item.title: What is FileCR.com? Complete Guide
item.description:
FileCR.com – Complete Guide

FileCR.com is a website that provides access to various types of software, including premium tools, applications, and plugins. It is popular among users who want to download paid software for free. However, it is important to understand both its features and risks before using it.

item.title: VLC Media Player – Complete Guide, Features, Download & Tips
item.description:
VLC Media Player – Complete Guide (Features, Download, Tips & Uses)

VLC Media Player is one of the most popular and powerful multimedia players in the world. It is free, open-source, and supports almost all audio and video formats without needing additional codecs.

item.title: ugenc.ai – Complete Information
item.description:
Ugenc.ai – Complete Information

Ugenc.ai is an advanced AI-powered content generation tool that helps users create high-quality blogs, marketing content, social media posts, and more within seconds. It is especially useful for bloggers, marketers, and business owners who want fast and SEO-friendly content.

item.title: Ubersuggest Complete Guide – Features, Tools & SEO Strategy
item.description:
Ubersuggest Complete Guide (Features, Tools & SEO Strategy)

Ubersuggest is a powerful SEO tool that helps website owners, bloggers, and digital marketers improve their search engine rankings. It provides keyword research, competitor analysis, site audit, and backlink data.

item.title: Opus.pro Kya Hai? AI Tool for Viral Video Shorts
item.description:
What is Opus.pro? Complete Guide to AI Video Clipping Tool

Opus.pro is an advanced AI-powered video editing tool that converts long videos into short, engaging, and viral clips automatically. It is mainly used by content creators, YouTubers, and marketers to create YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and TikTok videos.

item.title: Luma AI – Complete Guide
item.description:
Luma AI

Turn Real World into 3D with AI

item.title: GajabJobs.com – Complete Details, Features, Benefits & Uses
item.description:
GajabJobs.com

Complete Information, Features, Benefits & Usage Guide

item.title: What is YojnaPortal.com? Complete Guide
item.description:
YojnaPortal.com

Smart AI Tools for Photo Editing, Content Creation & Design

item.title: AIEase.ai – Complete Guide, Features, Uses & Earning Tips
item.description:
AIEase.ai

Smart AI Tools for Photo Editing, Content Creation & Design

item.title: Uncensored.com AI – Complete Guide
item.description:
Uncensored.com AI – Complete Guide

Uncensored.com AI is an artificial intelligence chat platform that allows users to interact with AI systems with fewer restrictions compared to traditional AI tools. It is designed to provide open conversations, creative exploration, and experimental AI interactions.

item.title: Devoice.io – AI Voice Generator and Voice Cloning Platform
item.description:
Devoice.io – AI Voice Generator and Voice Cloning Platform

Devoice.io is an advanced AI-powered voice generation platform that converts written text into natural and realistic speech. It allows content creators, marketers, and developers to generate professional-quality voiceovers without recording audio manually.

item.title: Auto AI – AI Automation Platform Explained
item.description:
Auto.ai – AI Automation Platform

What is Auto.ai?

Auto.ai is an Artificial Intelligence based automation platform designed to automate repetitive digital tasks, workflows, and business operations. By using advanced AI technologies such as machine learning, natural language processing, and automation algorithms, Auto.ai can perform tasks that normally require human effort.

item.title: Hera.video AI – Complete Guide
item.description:
Hera.video AI – Complete Guide

Hera.video is an advanced AI video generation platform that allows users to create videos automatically using artificial intelligence. Instead of recording or editing videos manually, users can generate videos using text prompts, scripts, or images.

item.title: Jitter Video AI – Features, Uses and Benefits
item.description:
Jitter Video AI – Complete Guide

Jitter Video AI is an online motion design and animation tool that allows users to create animated videos, social media graphics and marketing visuals directly in a web browser. It is designed for designers, marketers and content creators who want to build professional animations quickly without using complex software.

item.title: What is Perplexity AI? Features, Uses and Future
item.description:
What is Perplexity AI?

Perplexity AI is an advanced AI-powered search engine that provides direct answers to user questions using artificial intelligence. Unlike traditional search engines that show a list of website links, Perplexity AI analyzes information from the internet and generates clear answers along with source references.

item.title: Google Plus (Google+) – History, Launch and Shutdown Reason
item.description:
Google Plus (Google+) – History, Launch and Shutdown Reason

Google Plus (Google+) was a social networking platform created by Google. It was designed to compete with other popular social media platforms such as Facebook and Twitter. Users could share posts, photos, videos, and connect with friends or communities.

item.title: What is Grok AI? Features, Uses, and Future
item.description:
Grok AI – Complete Information

Grok AI is an advanced Artificial Intelligence chatbot developed by xAI, a company founded by Elon Musk. It is designed to provide intelligent answers, real-time information, and creative assistance to users.

item.title: Moltbook AI – Uses, Benefits and Future of AI Social Network
item.description:
What is Moltbook AI?

Moltbook is a unique experimental social media platform where Artificial Intelligence agents communicate with each other. Unlike traditional social media platforms where humans interact, Moltbook allows AI bots to create posts, reply to each other, and share ideas in automated conversations.

item.title: Sarvam AI: Powers, Features, Uses and Future of Indias AI Technology
item.description:
Sarvam AI: Powers, Features, Uses and Future

Sarvam AI is an Indian Artificial Intelligence company focused on building advanced AI technology for India's languages and digital ecosystem. The main goal of Sarvam AI is to develop powerful multilingual AI systems that can understand and generate content in many Indian languages.

item.title: Genspark AI – What It Is, Features, Tools and How to Earn Money
item.description:
Genspark AI – Complete Guide, Tools and Uses

Genspark AI is a modern artificial intelligence platform designed to help users create content, automate work, and analyze information using AI technology. It combines multiple AI capabilities such as content generation, research tools, automation systems and AI agents in one platform.

item.title: Advantages and Disadvantages of Artificial Intelligence
item.description:
Artificial Intelligence (AI): Benefits, Risks & Future Impact

🤖 What is Artificial Intelligence?

Artificial Intelligence (AI) is a modern technology that enables machines and software to think, learn, understand, and make decisions similar to humans. AI systems can analyze data, recognize patterns, solve problems, and automate tasks.

item.title: What is Gemini AI? Uses and Ways to Earn Money
item.description:
🤖 What is Gemini AI?

Gemini AI is an advanced Artificial Intelligence system developed by Google. It is a powerful multimodal AI tool that can understand and work with text, images, audio, video, and documents.

item.title: What is Meta AI? Uses, Benefits & How to Earn Money
item.description:
🤖 What is Meta AI?

Meta AI is an advanced Artificial Intelligence system developed by Meta. It works as a smart digital assistant that helps users with conversations, content creation, image generation, learning, and business tasks.

item.title: What is Kling AI? Benefits and How to Make Money
item.description:
What is Kling AI?

Kling AI is an advanced AI video generation tool that creates realistic videos from text prompts or images. It allows users to produce cinematic, high-quality videos without cameras, actors, or complex editing software.

item.title: What is OpenAI, ChatGPT vs OpenAI & Ways to Earn Money ?
item.description:
What is OpenAI?

OpenAI is an artificial intelligence (AI) research and technology company that builds powerful AI tools for people and businesses. Its mission is to ensure that artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity.

item.title: Claude AI – Features, Uses, and How It’s Different
item.description:
Claude AI – Complete Guide

Claude AI is an advanced AI chatbot and digital assistant developed by Anthropic. It understands natural language, answers questions, writes content, analyzes documents, and helps with coding and research.

item.title: What is Canva? Uses, Earning Methods and Important Information
item.description:
🎨 What is Canva? Uses, Earning Methods and Important Information

Canva is an online graphic design platform that allows anyone to create professional designs without advanced design skills. You can design posters, social media posts, logos, banners, presentations, videos, thumbnails and much more. It works smoothly on both mobile and desktop with an easy drag-and-drop interface.

item.title: What is Veo 3? Google’s Powerful AI Video Generation Model
item.description:
🎬 What is Veo 3? — Explained in Simple Words

Veo 3 is Google’s advanced AI video generation model that can create high-quality cinematic videos using simple text prompts or images. It uses artificial intelligence to understand your instructions and turns them into realistic videos with sound, motion, and visual effects.

item.title: What is Google Speech Generator?
item.description:
🎙️ What is Google Speech Generator?

Google Speech Generator is an AI-based service that converts written text into a natural human-like voice.

It is powered by Google Cloud technology and uses neural networks to produce realistic, high-quality speech.

🛠️ How does it work?

  • Type your text
  • The AI processes the content
  • Download the generated audio file

🌟 Key Features

  • ✅ 220+ voices available
  • ✅ Supports 40+ languages
  • ✅ Male & Female voices
  • ✅ HD Neural voice quality
  • ✅ Speed & Pitch control

🎧 Use Cases

  • YouTube voiceovers
  • Online courses
  • IVR call systems
  • Apps & websites voice features
❇️ Generate Speech

item.title: What is ChatGPT? Powers, Uses & Future Explained
item.description:
🤖 What is ChatGPT? Its Powers, Uses & Future

ChatGPT is an advanced Artificial Intelligence (AI) chatbot developed by OpenAI. It is designed to understand human language and respond naturally like a human conversation partner.

ChatGPT is based on GPT (Generative Pre-trained Transformer) technology, trained on vast amounts of text data to generate intelligent responses.

🧠 How Does ChatGPT Work?

ChatGPT uses machine learning, deep learning, and transformer architecture to understand user input and generate relevant responses. It analyzes context and produces meaningful answers within seconds.
